'''Rebel platforms''' were space stations constructed by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] and employed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

Each station was 2,100 meters long, boasting shields and eight [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] emplacements. Each station had a [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] for [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and also capacity for [[Soldier/Legends|troops]] and supplies.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

*<!-- 1999-05-03 -->[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
